messages.content:
## Examples

Q: What is the shared country of ancestry between Art Laboe and Scout Tufankjian?
A: Armenian

Q: Who will Billy Howle be seen opposite in the upcoming British drama film directed by Dominic Cooke?
A: Saoirse Ronan

Q: Who is the fictional head of a British Secret Service division and for which a one-time missionary was the inspiration for?
A: Q

## Question

Michaël Llodra of France, called "the best volleyer on tour", defeated Juan Martín del Potro a professional of what nationality?
